fields.acceptance_criteria: Click-to-edit fields in ticket detail view; editable: title, priority, component, risk_level, tags, custom fields; PATCH to /api/tickets/{id}; optimistic update with rollback on error; edit mode toggle
fields.title: Feature: Ticket inline editing — title, priority, component, custom fields

fields.acceptance_criteria: Click-to-edit fields in ticket detail view; editable fields: title, priority, component, risk_level, custom fields; PATCH to /api/tickets/{id}; optimistic update with gate (block further edits until server confirms); rollback on error; field validation (required fields cannot be blanked, enum fields validated against schema); concurrent edit handling: if SSE delivers conflicting server update while editing, show conflict dialog with local vs remote values and let user choose; no tags field (verify against schema before implementing)
fields.title: Feature: Ticket inline editing — title, priority, component, custom fields

fields.acceptance_criteria: Click-to-edit fields in ticket detail view; editable schema fields: title, priority, component, risk_level, tags, workflow_stage, phase, doc_category, release_target, release_version, rollout_stage (all optional string fields per tracker-improvement schema); PATCH to /api/tickets/{id}; optimistic update with gate (block further edits until server confirms); rollback on server error; field validation (required fields cannot be blanked, enum-style fields like priority/risk_level validated against known values from schema endpoint); concurrent edit conflict handling: if SSE delivers a conflicting server update while a field is being edited, show conflict dialog with local vs server values; bootstrap_blocker boolean field rendered as checkbox
fields.title: Feature: Ticket inline editing — title, priority, component, custom fields
